techniques.wet_on_wet: To create a dreamy, flowing effect that captures the ethereal nature of clouds mingling with mountain peaks.
techniques.gradient_washes: To subtly represent sunlight fading over distant peaks, giving depth to the painting without using outlines.
techniques.lifting: To create highlights and layers of mist in the valleys and peaks, suggesting depth and dimensions.
techniques.splattering: To add a textured feel representing rugged, snow-capped mountains.

composition.foreground: Depict lower, softer rolling hills using lighter, more translucent washes of cerulean blue.
composition.midground: Use bold, saturated ultramarine and indigo to define the main range of mountains, keeping the edges soft and focusing on the interplay of light and shadow.
composition.background: Fade the furthest mountains into misty silhouettes with cool greys and slight touches of Payne's grey, focusing on atmospheric perspective.
composition.sky: Create a dynamic, textured sky using a mix of Payne’s grey and indigo, reworking with white and silver accents to mimic the changing sky near mountain peaks.
